text:
There once was a wise old owl. Every morning he would sit atop his favorite branch. He loved watching the world awake around him. One day a young fox decided to copy the owl. He sat atop his own branch waiting patiently. Watching the owl. admiring him.Copying him.

The owl simply smiled. He didn*He simply looked upwards. He simply fluttered his wings gracefully. And that afternoon the young fox owl flew gracefully into the sky! He had copied the wise old owl perfectly! Owls everywhere loved him! And he loved them back. He lived happily ever after. And they all sang.
